# VERIFY: #212 — refactor: rename 'recipes' to 'plays' across the entire codebase
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Verify that no 'recipe'/'recipes' references remain and all paths are consistent after the rename.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `git ls-files | xargs grep -li "recipe" 2>/dev/null` returns zero results (excluding `.git/` internals)
- [ ] `find . -name "*recipe*" -not -path "./.git/*"` returns zero results across tracked paths
- [ ] `core/config.yaml` has key `components.plays:` pointing to `./core/components/plays/`
- [ ] `core/config.yaml` STM path templates use `{play-name}` instead of `{recipe-name}`
- [ ] `installer/install.sh` iterates `$COMPONENTS_DIR/plays` (not `recipes`)
- [ ] `core/components/skills/sync-claude/scripts/sync.sh` copies from `"$SOURCE/plays"`
- [ ] `core/components/skills/sync-droids/scripts/sync.sh` iterates `"$SOURCE/plays"`
- [ ] Directory `core/components/plays/create-play/` exists and `SKILL.md` shows `name: create-play`
- [ ] `docs/components/plays.md` exists and `docs/components/recipes.md` does not
- [ ] `docs/framework/play-structure.md` exists and `docs/framework/recipe-structure.md` does not
- [ ] `docs/adr/013-play-maturity-model.md` exists and `docs/adr/013-recipe-maturity-model.md` does not
- [ ] `docs/usage/plays/` exists and `docs/usage/recipes/` does not
- [ ] No file uses "L1 recipe," "L2 recipe," "L1 Recipes," or "L2 Recipes"
- [ ] All `.meridian/project/issues/*/evidence/create-recipe/` directories renamed to `create-play/`
- [ ] All `recipe-analysis.md` files renamed to `play-analysis.md`
- [ ] `.meridian/project/issues/67/spec/ship-recipe*.md` files renamed to `ship-play*.md`
- [ ] `.claude/specs/recipe-eval-gen/` renamed to `.claude/specs/play-eval-gen/`
- [ ] Cross-reference links in docs updated to new filenames

## Verification Steps

| Step | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1. Full-text grep | `git ls-files \| xargs grep -li "recipe" 2>/dev/null` | Zero files returned |
| 2. Path grep | `find . -name "*recipe*" -not -path "./.git/*"` | Zero entries |
| 3. Config key check | `grep "recipes:" core/config.yaml` | Zero results |
| 4. Sync-claude dry run | Run sync.sh, review output | Reports copying from `plays/`, no errors |
| 5. Installer scan | `grep "recipes" installer/install.sh` | Zero results |
| 6. Link integrity | `grep -r "recipes\.md\|recipe-structure\|013-recipe" docs/ CLAUDE.md README.md AGENTS.md` | Zero results |
| 7. create-play identity | `head -5 core/components/plays/create-play/SKILL.md` | Shows `name: create-play` |
| 8. STM directory check | `git ls-files .meridian/ \| grep "create-recipe"` | Zero results |
| 9. Template variable check | `git ls-files \| xargs grep -li "{recipe-name}" 2>/dev/null` | Zero results |
| 10. L1/L2 level-drop check | `git ls-files \| xargs grep -Eqi "L1 recipe\|L2 recipe" 2>/dev/null` | Zero results |

## Edge Cases

| Scenario | Expected Behavior |
|----------|------------------|
| "receiptId" or similar unrelated strings | Must NOT be changed — verify `grep "receipt"` shows no false renames |
| `playbook` references in `.claude/specs/idsd/` | These are NeuroSDLC comparison content — do not change |
| `{play-name}` template variable | Must appear wherever `{recipe-name}` was in `create-play/SKILL.md` and `core/config.yaml` |
| ADR internal cross-references (e.g., "see ADR 013-recipe-maturity-model") | Updated to new filename in all docs |
| `.meridian/product/meridian-os/roadmap.md` "E2 — Recipe Execution Engine" | Renamed to "E2 — Play Execution Engine" |
| `docs/adr/001` title "Three-Layer Hierarchy (L2 → L1 → Skills)" | Title preserved; body "L2 Recipes"/"L1 Recipes" renamed to "High-Order Plays"/"Atomic Plays" |
| `.claude/settings.local.json` (gitignored) | Not a tracked file — manual note only; not a failure condition |
